entry.title: New: RES25-180 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING, MEALS, AND MATERIAL EXPENSES, VALUED AT $9,771, TO THE CITY FROM BLOOMBERG PHILANTHROPIES FOR THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF THE OFFICE OF ECONOMIC REVITALIZATION; DEPUTY DIRECTOR OF THE OFFICE OF CLIMATE CHANGE, SUSTAINABILITY, AND RESILIENCY; AND PROGRAM ADMINISTRATOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION SERVICES TO ATTEND THE BLOOMBERG PHILANTHROPIES 2025 GLOBAL MAYOR’S CHALLENGE IDEAS CAMP IN BOGOTA, COLOMBIA FROM JULY 19-25, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
